_publications._publicationTitle: Combined Inhibition of SHP2 and MEK Is Effective in Models of NF1-Deficient Malignant Peripheral Nerve Sheath Tumors.

_contextSnippet: Of note, the sporadic MPNST cell line STS26T and the melanoma cell line M308 harbor the BRAF V600E mutation, which confers resistance to SHP2 inhibition
details: Sporadic MPNST cell line harboring BRAF V600E mutation showed resistance to SHP2 inhibition
